descriptions.zh: AgencyBenchAdapter 用作Tau2Adapter的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 AgencyBenchAdapter 的已审查定义是“AgencyBench 适配器是一种基准适配器；其区分条件是：它把长时程任务、工具调用压力、上下文长度、多步观察和评分证据映射到规范任务、运行、工具和评估适配术语。”。不能因 shared parent BenchmarkAdapter 而把它归入Tau2Adapter。
descriptions.en: AgencyBenchAdapter is the boundary contrast for Tau2Adapter. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but AgencyBenchAdapter's reviewed definition is “As a benchmark adapter, AgencyBench adapter is distinguished by the fact that it maps AgencyBench long-horizon tasks, tool-call pressure, context length, multi-step observations, and scoring evidence into canonical task, runtime, tool, and evaluation adapter terms.”. shared parent BenchmarkAdapter does not make it a Tau2Adapter.
descriptions.ja: AgencyBenchAdapter は Tau2Adapter の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、AgencyBenchAdapter の審査済み定義は「ベンチマークアダプターに属するAgencyBench アダプターは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、長期タスク、ツール呼び出し負荷、文脈長、多段階観測、採点証拠を、標準タスク、実行、ツール、評価アダプタ用語へ写像します。」です。shared parent BenchmarkAdapter だけで Tau2Adapter にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: AgencyBenchAdapter 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 Tau2Adapter。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 Tau2Adapter（tau2 适配器）由 adapter-benchmarks 拥有，用于“当对象是某个命名基准及版本中的构造，且其意义来自该基准的任务或评分规范时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms Tau2Adapter (tau2 adapter) is owned by adapter-benchmarks for the use case “Own an object when it is a construct in a named benchmark version and derives its meaning from that benchmark's task or scoring specification.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は Tau2Adapter（tau2 アダプター）を adapter-benchmarks が「対象が名前付きベンチマーク版の構造で、その意味がタスクまたは採点仕様に由来する場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 Tau2Adapter 的 semantic kind 为 capability，主父或骨架为 Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter，并满足“semantic kind=capability；backbone=Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Tau2Adapter has semantic kind capability, primary parent or backbone Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter, and invariants “semantic kind=capability; backbone=Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は Tau2Adapter の semantic kind が capability、主親または骨格が Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter であり、「semantic kind=capability、backbone=Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: Tau2Adapter 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for Tau2Adapter were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: Tau2Adapter の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: tau2 适配器已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: tau2 adapter was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: tau2 アダプターは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 已审查兄弟区分：父节点 BenchmarkAdapter：Tau2Adapter（semantic kind=capability，骨架 Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter）；TerminalBenchAdapter（semantic kind=capability，骨架 TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter）。双端条件：Tau2Adapter 条件：“作为基准适配器，tau2 适配器由这一事实区分：它把对话任务环境、知识约束、用户模拟条件、任务结果和基准验证信号映射到规范评估适配术语”；TerminalBenchAdapter 条件：“作为基准适配器，Terminal-Bench 适配器由这一事实区分：TerminalBench 适配器把终端命令任务、类容器终端执行、命令产物、评分检查和资源压力映射到规范运行、命令、产物和评估术语”。任一条件成立不推出另一端。
differentia.en: Reviewed sibling distinction: parent BenchmarkAdapter: Tau2Adapter (semantic kind=capability, backbone Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter); TerminalBenchAdapter (semantic kind=capability, backbone TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter). Endpoint conditions: Tau2Adapter condition: “Tau2 adapter belongs to the benchmark adapter category and differs from broader members in that it maps tau2 conversational task environments, knowledge constraints, user-simulation conditions, task outcomes, and benchmark verification signals into canonical evaluation adapter terms”; TerminalBenchAdapter condition: “Terminal-Bench adapter belongs to the benchmark adapter category and differs from broader members in that it maps Terminal-Bench shell tasks, container-like terminal execution, command artifacts, grading checks, and resource pressure into canonical runtime, command, artifact, and evaluation terms”. Either condition leaves the other unproven.
differentia.ja: 審査済み兄弟区別：親 BenchmarkAdapter：Tau2Adapter（semantic kind=capability、バックボーン Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter）；TerminalBenchAdapter（semantic kind=capability、バックボーン TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter）。両端条件：Tau2Adapter の条件：「tau2 アダプターはベンチマークアダプターとして、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、会話タスク環境、知識制約、ユーザーシミュレーション条件、タスク結果、ベンチマーク検証信号を、標準評価アダプタ用語へ写像します」；TerminalBenchAdapter の条件：「Terminal-Bench アダプターはベンチマークアダプターとして、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、シェルタスク、コンテナ状の端末実行、コマンド成果物、採点確認、資源負荷を、標準実行、コマンド、成果物、評価用語へ対応付けます」。一方の成立は他方を証明しません。

short_definitions.en: Terminal-Bench adapter belongs to the benchmark adapter category and differs from broader members in that it maps Terminal-Bench shell tasks, container-like terminal execution, command artifacts, grading checks, and resource pressure into canonical runtime, command, artifact, and evaluation terms.

The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter.

descriptions.zh: 在一次外部框架或协议的集成构建中，系统将Terminal-Bench 适配器（TerminalBenchAdapter）记录为 TerminalBenchAdapter is_a BenchmarkAdapter 的源端点。其已审查定义是“作为基准适配器，Terminal-Bench 适配器由这一事实区分：TerminalBench 适配器把终端命令任务、类容器终端执行、命令产物、评分检查和资源压力映射到规范运行、命令、产物和评估术语”。记录同时写入经审查字段 adapter_id="adapter-terminal-bench", adapter_version="2.0.0", scope=["task","terminal-environment","command-trajectory","metric","outcome"], status="supported", benchmark_version="Terminal-Bench@2.1", conformance_status="verified"。
descriptions.en: During an integration build for an external framework or protocol, the system records Terminal-Bench adapter (TerminalBenchAdapter) as the source of TerminalBenchAdapter is_a BenchmarkAdapter. Its reviewed definition is “Terminal-Bench adapter belongs to the benchmark adapter category and differs from broader members in that it maps Terminal-Bench shell tasks, container-like terminal execution, command artifacts, grading checks, and resource pressure into canonical runtime, command, artifact, and evaluation terms”. The record also binds reviewed fields adapter_id="adapter-terminal-bench", adapter_version="2.0.0", scope=["task","terminal-environment","command-trajectory","metric","outcome"], status="supported", benchmark_version="Terminal-Bench@2.1", conformance_status="verified".

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 TerminalBenchAdapter（Terminal-Bench 适配器）由 adapter-benchmarks 拥有，用于“当对象是某个命名基准及版本中的构造，且其意义来自该基准的任务或评分规范时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms TerminalBenchAdapter (Terminal-Bench adapter) is owned by adapter-benchmarks for the use case “Own an object when it is a construct in a named benchmark version and derives its meaning from that benchmark's task or scoring specification.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は TerminalBenchAdapter（Terminal-Bench アダプター）を adapter-benchmarks が「対象が名前付きベンチマーク版の構造で、その意味がタスクまたは採点仕様に由来する場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 TerminalBenchAdapter 的 semantic kind 为 capability，主父或骨架为 TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter，并满足“semantic kind=capability；backbone=TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms TerminalBenchAdapter has semantic kind capability, primary parent or backbone TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter, and invariants “semantic kind=capability; backbone=TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は TerminalBenchAdapter の semantic kind が capability、主親または骨格が TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter であり、「semantic kind=capability、backbone=TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: TerminalBenchAdapter 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for TerminalBenchAdapter were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: TerminalBenchAdapter の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.en: Terminal-Bench adapter was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: Terminal-Bench アダプターは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 正向身份比较：父节点 BenchmarkAdapter：TerminalBenchAdapter（semantic kind=capability，骨架 TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter）；AgencyBenchAdapter（semantic kind=capability，骨架 AgencyBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter）。双端条件：TerminalBenchAdapter 条件：“作为基准适配器，Terminal-Bench 适配器由这一事实区分：TerminalBench 适配器把终端命令任务、类容器终端执行、命令产物、评分检查和资源压力映射到规范运行、命令、产物和评估术语”；AgencyBenchAdapter 条件：“AgencyBench 适配器是一种基准适配器；其区分条件是：它把长时程任务、工具调用压力、上下文长度、多步观察和评分证据映射到规范任务、运行、工具和评估适配术语”。仅依据各自定义与骨架逐端验证。
differentia.en: Positive identity comparison: parent BenchmarkAdapter: TerminalBenchAdapter (semantic kind=capability, backbone TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter); AgencyBenchAdapter (semantic kind=capability, backbone AgencyBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter). Endpoint conditions: TerminalBenchAdapter condition: “Terminal-Bench adapter belongs to the benchmark adapter category and differs from broader members in that it maps Terminal-Bench shell tasks, container-like terminal execution, command artifacts, grading checks, and resource pressure into canonical runtime, command, artifact, and evaluation terms”; AgencyBenchAdapter condition: “As a benchmark adapter, AgencyBench adapter is distinguished by the fact that it maps AgencyBench long-horizon tasks, tool-call pressure, context length, multi-step observations, and scoring evidence into canonical task, runtime, tool, and evaluation adapter terms”. Verify each endpoint from its own definition and backbone.
differentia.ja: 正の同一性比較：親 BenchmarkAdapter：TerminalBenchAdapter（semantic kind=capability、バックボーン TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter）；AgencyBenchAdapter（semantic kind=capability、バックボーン AgencyBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter）。両端条件：TerminalBenchAdapter の条件：「Terminal-Bench アダプターはベンチマークアダプターとして、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、シェルタスク、コンテナ状の端末実行、コマンド成果物、採点確認、資源負荷を、標準実行、コマンド、成果物、評価用語へ対応付けます」；AgencyBenchAdapter の条件：「ベンチマークアダプターに属するAgencyBench アダプターは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、長期タスク、ツール呼び出し負荷、文脈長、多段階観測、採点証拠を、標準タスク、実行、ツール、評価アダプタ用語へ写像します」。各端を固有の定義とバックボーンで検証します。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 BenchmarkAdapter-maps_artifact_to-Artifact 的 predicate 为 maps_artifact_to，方向为 BenchmarkAdapter → Artifact，relation kind 为 mapping，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 BenchmarkAdapter→Artifact、predicate=maps_artifact_to、relation kind=mapping、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation BenchmarkAdapter-maps_artifact_to-Artifact has predicate maps_artifact_to, direction BenchmarkAdapter → Artifact, relation kind mapping, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction BenchmarkAdapter->Artifact, predicate=maps_artifact_to, relation kind=mapping, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 BenchmarkAdapter-maps_artifact_to-Artifact の predicate が maps_artifact_to、方向が BenchmarkAdapter → Artifact、relation kind が mapping、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 BenchmarkAdapter→Artifact、predicate=maps_artifact_to、relation kind=mapping、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: BenchmarkAdapter-maps_artifact_to-Artifact 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for BenchmarkAdapter-maps_artifact_to-Artifact were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.

definitions.zh: 基准环境映射到运行环境概念。
definitions.en: A benchmark environment maps to RuntimeEnvironment.
definitions.ja: 基準環境は RuntimeEnvironment へ写像します。

cardinality_not_applicable_reason.zh: 该本体关系记录可查询的语义事实，但不对所有运行实例施加统一基数。
cardinality_not_applicable_reason.en: This ontology relation records a queryable semantic fact without imposing one universal cardinality on all runtime instances.
cardinality_not_applicable_reason.ja: この本体関係は検索可能な意味事実を記録しますが、すべての実行インスタンスに一律の基数を課しません。

labels.en: is target of maps environment to

authority_basis.zh: BenchmarkAdapter 仍由 adapter-plane 拥有，RuntimeEnvironment 仍由 runtime-plane 拥有；该 mapping 事实只建立跨域依赖，不转移规范所有权。运行时授权必须由具体 PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant 或协议会话证明。
authority_basis.en: BenchmarkAdapter remains owned by adapter-plane and RuntimeEnvironment by runtime-plane; this mapping fact establishes a cross-Domain dependency without transferring canonical ownership. Runtime authority must be evidenced by a concrete PolicyDecision, AuthorizationGrant, or protocol session.
authority_basis.ja: BenchmarkAdapter は adapter-plane、RuntimeEnvironment は runtime-plane に引き続き所有されます。この mapping 事実は正規所有権を移さずドメイン横断依存だけを表し、実行時権限には具体的な PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant、またはプロトコルセッションの証拠が必要です。

protocol_or_resource_context.zh: 查询必须沿 BenchmarkAdapter → RuntimeEnvironment 的 canonical ID 与该关系自身的来源主张执行；协议版本、资源标识和信任判定保留在两端节点的信息合同中。
protocol_or_resource_context.en: Queries follow the canonical BenchmarkAdapter → RuntimeEnvironment assertion and this relation's own source claims; protocol version, resource identity, and trust decisions remain in the endpoint information contracts.
protocol_or_resource_context.ja: 問い合わせは BenchmarkAdapter → RuntimeEnvironment の canonical ID と当該関係固有の出典主張に従います。プロトコル版、資源識別、信頼判断は両端ノードの情報契約に保持されます。

descriptions.en: In synthetic run BenchmarkAdapter-maps_environment_to-RuntimeEnvironment-scenario-001, BenchmarkAdapter explicitly maps environment to RuntimeEnvironment; the assertion preserves its source-to-target direction, predicate, and qualifiers. expected_result.zh: 该对象按定义被识别为maps environment to。
expected_result.en: The object is classified as maps environment to under the reviewed definition.
expected_result.ja: この対象はレビュー済み定義によりmaps environment toとして分類されます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该例满足maps environment to的定义边界和归属条件。

why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例はmaps environment toの定義境界と所属条件を満たします。

labels.en: is target of maps score to

authority_basis.zh: BenchmarkAdapter 仍由 adapter-plane 拥有，Score 仍由 feedback-plane 拥有；该 mapping 事实只建立跨域依赖，不转移规范所有权。运行时授权必须由具体 PolicyDecision、AuthorizationGrant 或协议会话证明。

definitions.en: links a benchmark adapter to the canonical Metric term used when benchmark scores, success rates, grading checks, rubrics, or pressure axes are represented as evaluation evidence.

descriptions.zh: Tau2Adapter 与 BenchmarkAdapter 同时出现但没有可验证的“是一种”断言；仅共现不能建立该关系。 审查定义：tau2 适配器 是一种 基准适配器。区分特征：tau2 适配器以双主体对话、工具操作、领域策略与验证结果映射为区分特征。
descriptions.en: Tau2Adapter and BenchmarkAdapter co-occur without a verifiable is a assertion; co-occurrence alone does not establish this relation. Reviewed definition: tau2 adapter is a kind of benchmark adapter. Reviewed differentia: Tau2Adapter specializes BenchmarkAdapter by dual-party dialogue, tool action, domain policy, and verification-result mappings.
descriptions.ja: Tau2Adapter と BenchmarkAdapter は同時に現れますが、検証可能な「の一種である」アサーションがなく、共起だけではこの関係を成立させません。 審査済み定義：tau2 アダプター は ベンチマークアダプター の一種です。審査済みの種差：Tau2Adapter は二者対話・ツール操作・領域方針・検証結果写像で BenchmarkAdapter を特殊化します。

expected_result.zh: 验证器不得把该对象归类为是一种。
expected_result.en: Validation must not classify the object as is a.
expected_result.ja: 検証器はこの対象をの一種であるとして分類してはなりません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter（是一种）由 adapter-benchmarks 拥有，用于“当对象是某个命名基准及版本中的构造，且其意义来自该基准的任务或评分规范时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter (is a) is owned by adapter-benchmarks for the use case “Own an object when it is a construct in a named benchmark version and derives its meaning from that benchmark's task or scoring specification.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter（の一種である）を adapter-benchmarks が「対象が名前付きベンチマーク版の構造で、その意味がタスクまたは採点仕様に由来する場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 Tau2Adapter → BenchmarkAdapter，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 Tau2Adapter→BenchmarkAdapter、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter has predicate is_a, direction Tau2Adapter → BenchmarkAdapter, relation kind hierarchy, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction Tau2Adapter->BenchmarkAdapter, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter の predicate が is_a、方向が Tau2Adapter → BenchmarkAdapter、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 Tau2Adapter→BenchmarkAdapter、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: Tau2Adapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: v3 依据显式关系决策确认 canonical 方向与默认逻辑骨架职责。
change_note.en: v3 confirmed canonical direction and default logical-backbone responsibility from explicit relation decisions.
change_note.ja: v3 は明示的な関係判断に基づき canonical 方向と既定論理バックボーン責務を確認しました。

definitions.zh: Terminal-Bench 适配器 是一种 基准适配器。区分特征：Terminal-Bench 适配器以容器环境、终端命令轨迹、生成产物与验证器结果映射为区分特征。
definitions.en: Terminal-Bench adapter is a kind of benchmark adapter. Reviewed differentia: TerminalBenchAdapter specializes BenchmarkAdapter by container environment, terminal-command trajectory, artifact, and verifier-result mappings.
definitions.ja: Terminal-Bench アダプター は ベンチマークアダプター の一種です。審査済みの種差：TerminalBenchAdapter はコンテナ環境・端末コマンド軌跡・成果物・検証器結果写像で BenchmarkAdapter を特殊化します。

cardinality_not_applicable_reason.zh: 分类继承不使用实例关系基数。

cardinality_not_applicable_reason.ja: 分類継承にはインスタンス関係の基数を用いません。

descriptions.zh: 在合成运行 TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter-scenario-001 中，TerminalBenchAdapter 通过“是一种”明确指向 BenchmarkAdapter；记录保留 source→target 方向、谓词和限定条件。 审查定义：Terminal-Bench 适配器 是一种 基准适配器。区分特征：Terminal-Bench 适配器以容器环境、终端命令轨迹、生成产物与验证器结果映射为区分特征。
descriptions.en: In synthetic run TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter-scenario-001, TerminalBenchAdapter explicitly is a BenchmarkAdapter; the assertion preserves its source-to-target direction, predicate, and qualifiers. Reviewed definition: Terminal-Bench adapter is a kind of benchmark adapter. Reviewed differentia: TerminalBenchAdapter specializes BenchmarkAdapter by container environment, terminal-command trajectory, artifact, and verifier-result mappings.
descriptions.ja: 合成実行 TerminalBenchAdapter-is_a-BenchmarkAdapter-scenario-001 で、TerminalBenchAdapter は「の一種である」により BenchmarkAdapter を明示的に指します。アサーションは source→target の方向、述語、限定条件を保持します。 審査済み定義：Terminal-Bench アダプター は ベンチマークアダプター の一種です。審査済みの種差：TerminalBenchAdapter はコンテナ環境・端末コマンド軌跡・成果物・検証器結果写像で BenchmarkAdapter を特殊化します。

expected_result.zh: 该对象按定义被识别为是一种。
expected_result.en: The object is classified as is a under the reviewed definition.
expected_result.ja: この対象はレビュー済み定義によりの一種であるとして分類されます。
